# numberOfRows()

**Instance Method**

Retrieves the number of rows in the composition picker view.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func numberOfRows() -> Int
```

## Return Value

The number of columns.

## Working with Columns and Rows

- **setNumberOfColumns(_:)**: Sets the number of columns in the composition picker view.
- **numberOfColumns()**: Retrieves the number of columns in the composition picker view.
- **setNumberOfRows(_:)**: Sets the number of rows in the composition picker view.
